title: magnolia officinalis var. biloba
intro: Magnolia officinalis var. biloba, also known as Houx or Biloban, is a plant species native to China, classified under the family Magnoliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and supplements.
